ogTitle: Cairdbeign vs Cairns North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cairdbeign and Cairns North.
heading: Cairdbeign vs Cairns North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cairdbeign, Queensland and Cairns North, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cairdbeign has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cairns North (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cairdbeign or Cairns North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cairdbeign has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Cairns North scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cairdbeign scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Cairns North scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cairdbeign or Cairns North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cairdbeign has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
